laws.title: Utah Minimum Wage — Federal Rate ($7.25/hr)
laws.summary: Utah's minimum wage is $7.25/hour (the federal minimum). Utah is a right-to-work state and has limited state-specific employment law requirements beyond federal obligations.
compliance_actions: Utah has no state-mandated paid leave programs
Ensure required federal employment posters are displayed at Utah worksites

laws.title: Utah Non-Compete Agreements — 1-Year Maximum Duration
laws.summary: Utah limits post-employment non-compete agreements to a maximum of 1 year in duration. Non-competes that exceed 1 year are void. The law applies to post-employment restrictions; non-solicitation and non-disclosure agreements are not affected by this limit.
compliance_actions: Ensure Utah non-compete agreements do not exceed 1 year in duration
Review any Utah non-competes that currently extend beyond 1 year — they may be void
Non-solicitation and NDA provisions are not subject to the 1-year cap
